sections.heading: Parameters
sections.body:
| Parameter  | Type | Description                                                                      | Required? |
| ---------- | ---- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| listStores | int  | Indicates that all federated database instance stores be listed.Value must be 1. | yes       |

sections.heading: Output
Example
sections.body:
The following example uses the `listStores` command to list all
federated database instance stores in an federated database instance storage configuration.

```json
use sample
db.runCommand({ listStores: 1 })
```

The previous command prints the following:

```json
{
  "ok": 1,
  "cursor": {
    "firstBatch": [
      {
        "name": "s3store",
        "provider": "s3",
        "region": "us-east-1",
        "bucket": "my-bucket",
        "delimiter": "/",
        "prefix": ""
      },
      {
        "name" : "atlasStore",
        "provider" : "atlas",
        "clusterName" : "myTestCluster",
        "projectId" : "<project-id>"
      }
    ],
    "id": NumberLong(0),
    "ns": "sample.$cmd.listStores"
  }
}
```
